BANKERISE PARTNER ACADEMY

Become a Bankerise pro
Enrol. Download. Certify.

Three short tracks — Become a Partner, Use Bankerise, Sell Bankerise. Enrol in any course, download the playbook PDF, and mark it complete when you're done. Your progress is saved on this device.

Start Learning Apply to be a Partner
0%

Your Progress

0 of 9 courses completed

TRACK 01

Become a Partner

0 / 3
Track Certified

Everything you need to apply, choose your tier, and onboard with Bankerise.

P-101 ✓

Bankerise Partner Program 101

Why partner with Bankerise, who the program is for, and the benefits at every tier.

45 min 4 modules

Not started

P-110 ✓

Choosing Your Tier — Bronze, Silver or Gold

A decision framework to pick the tier that matches your team size, market and ambition.

30 min 3 modules

Not started

P-120 ✓

Onboarding & Legal Setup

From application to credentials — paperwork, MoU, NDAs and how long each step takes.

40 min 4 modules

Not started

TRACK 02

Use Bankerise

0 / 3
Track Certified

Master the platform — architecture, configuration, APIs. The technical foundation.

U-201 ✓

Bankerise Platform Architecture

Modules, services, data flow — the mental model every consultant needs day one.

55 min 5 modules

Not started

U-210 ✓

Configuring the Banking Modules

Walk through configuration — products, rules, channels — without writing a line of code.

60 min 6 modules

Not started

U-220 ✓

API Integration Basics

Authenticate, call core APIs, subscribe to webhooks. The minimum viable integration.

50 min 5 modules

Not started

TRACK 03

Sell Bankerise

0 / 3
Track Certified

Pitch, demo, handle objections, close. The playbook that turns interest into deals.

S-301 ✓

The Bankerise Pitch

A 3-minute story that lands with bank executives — from problem to proof.

35 min 4 modules

Not started

S-310 ✓

Live Demo Walkthrough

A 25-minute scripted demo covering onboarding, lending and analytics — in that order.

50 min 5 modules

Not started

S-320 ✓

Handling Objections & Closing

The 8 objections you will hear in MEA and how to answer each in under 60 seconds.

40 min 4 modules

Not started

★

CERTIFIED PARTNER

Bankerise Partner Academy Diploma

Complete every course in the three tracks to unlock your Bankerise Partner certification — proof you're ready to onboard, deliver, and sell.

🔒 Locked — finish all 9 courses to unlock ★ Unlocked — ready to share with the partner team

Apply with my certificate Talk to a partner manager
1

Enrol

Pick any course and click Enrol. No account, no login — just start.

2

Download the PDF

A branded course playbook is generated and downloads to your device.

3

Mark complete

Once you've read it, mark the course complete to update your progress.
